---
title: q.feature Roadmap
---

Only open work is listed here. Completed items are removed.

## Planned

- [ ] tsfresh wrappers for automated feature extraction
- [ ] Feature pipelines: apply a set of features across a universe of symbols

- [ ] https://github.com/blue-yonder/tsfresh (library for Time Series Feature extraction)
- [ ] https://github.com/Quantreo/quantreo (might be some things here we can use)
- [ ] https://oryonlib.dev/getting-started/installation/ (has replaces quantreo)
